title: 2013 Press Releases
summary: This is a listing/index page aggregating all Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2013, spanning items from January through December 2013. The page contains hundreds of disparate items including regulatory guidance, enforcement actions, banking applications, FOMC statements, monetary policy communications, and operational notices. As a listing page, it is not itself an archiveable research document.
key_points: This is a listing page (index) of press releases, not an individual source document
Items span the full calendar year 2013 with dates ranging from early 2013 to 12/27/2013
Contains mixed content types: regulatory guidance, enforcement actions, banking applications, monetary policy items
Some potentially relevant individual items exist within the list (FOMC statements, projections, minutes, Volcker rule final rules)
Individual press releases from this page would be candidates for separate archival if targeted individually
why_it_matters: This listing page aggregates hundreds of disparate 2013 Fed press releases and is not itself an archiveable research document. Individual items within it (FOMC statements from 12/18/2013, FOMC projections, Volcker rule final rules from 12/10/2013, market risk capital rule from 12/6/2013) are candidates for separate archival.

issues_found: Source is a listing/index page aggregating all 2013 Federal Reserve press releases - not an individual archiveable document
Per CORE RULE 5: PAGE_TYPE listing_page mandates rejection
Per CORE RULE 6: Container/listing pages bias toward reject
Contains no coherent narrative or substantive analysis - only a chronological index of disparate items
Published date (2013-12-27) is approximately 12+ years before TODAY and lacks standalone archival value as a listing page

notes: Non-archiveable listing page per CORE RULE 6. Individual press releases within this list could be targeted for separate archival. The source itself provides no substantive analysis or synthesis. Historical record (2013 data, over 12 years old). Lower confidence due to source type and age.
